data.title: The Supreme Court case involving Lisa Cook’s firing is overshadowed by a Federal Reserve investigation into chair Jerome H. Powell.
data.description: Ms. Cook's case disputing her termination will be heard by the court as the Justice Department investigates Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the central bank.

data.title: Advantech's Taiwan manufacturing center achieves AS9100 certification, ensuring quality in high-stakes applications.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in Taipei, Advantech, a top provider of embedded IoT computing solutions, stated that its manufacturing center in Taiwan has obtained AS9100 quality management system certification. This certification is based on the ISO standards for quality management and signifies a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: Terex appoints Namita Jindal as Chief AI & Data Officer, effective immediately. Jindal reports to Terex President & CEO Simon Meester.
data.description: Terex Corporation (NYSE: TEX) revealed their latest appointment on Jan. 19, 2026, in Norwalk, Connecticut. Namita Jindal is set to take on the role of Senior Vice President and Chief AI and Data Officer. This change, effective immediately, positions her under the authority of Simon Meester, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Terex.

data.title: Coinbase CEO withdraws support for Clarity Act, criticizing flaws in legislation. Act faces heavy criticism in industry.
data.description: Coinbase's CEO Brian Armstrong has decided to no longer support the proposed Crypto Clarity Act, claiming it has significant flaws. Critics in the market view this move positively for cryptocurrencies. The Act has faced backlash within the crypto sector due to concerns that it aims to centralize and regulate digital assets in the name of protecting consumers. Detractors argue that the legislation favors traditional financial institutions over decentralized finance, with issues such as a suggested prohibition on tokenized stocks, strict constraints on DeFi impacting financial privacy, a shift of regulatory authority from the CFTC to the SEC, and potential revisions that could greatly limit the industry.
Fitch Ratings: Chinese investment contraction raises cross-sector credit risk in 2026.

data.title: SPIE and UNC Charlotte create $1-million endowed fund for doctoral-research scholarships. 500k gift from SPIE, matched by UNC Charlotte Foundation.
data.description: In Bellingham, Washington, SPIE and the University of North Carolina at Charlotte revealed the creation of the SPIE Emerging Innovators in Optical Science and Engineering Scholarship at SPIE Photonics West in San Francisco. SPIE donated $500,000, which was supplemented by a matching $500,000 donation from the UNC Charlotte Foundation, resulting in a total endowment fund of $1 million. This scholarship initiative falls under the SPIE Endowment Matching Program.

data.title: Bitwise names Shyam Natarajan as Chief Strategy Officer to drive AI-first modernization.
data.description: Bitwise, a company specializing in AI, data, and digital engineering services, has appointed Shyam Natarajan as its new Chief Strategy Officer in a bid to accelerate AI-first modernization and enterprise transformation. The appointment was announced on January 19, 2026, in Chicago. This move comes as part of Bitwise's efforts to drive growth and innovation in the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Valneva withdraws Chikungunya vaccine application in the US after FDA suspension in 2025, now under investigation for SAE.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Valneva SE disclosed its decision to self-withdraw the biologics license application (BLA) and Investigational New Drug (IND) application for IXCHIQ®, its chikungunya vaccine, in the United States. This move comes after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) suspended the license back in August 2025. The company was awaiting instructions on how to formally address the vaccine license suspension. Recently, the FDA mandated a hold on the IND for clinical purposes, pending an investigation into a newly reported serious adverse event (SAE) from a foreign source. Valneva's stock trades on Nasdaq under VALN and on Euronext Paris under VLA.

data.title: Digital Realty acquires data center in Cyberjaya, Malaysia, expanding into Southeast Asia's growing market.
data.description: The recent purchase of a strategically located data center in Cyberjaya has allowed PlatformDIGITAL® to expand its reach into one of Southeast Asia's rapidly developing digital hubs. This move signifies a significant milestone in the company's growth strategy in the region, tapping into a market that is witnessing substantial digital advancements. This acquisition provides PlatformDIGITAL with access to a highly interconnected facility, further solidifying its position in the market. This development underscores the company's commitment to capitalizing on the flourishing digital sector in Southeast Asia.

data.title: New Caldwell Clays™ App offers advanced clay shooting with custom features like Touch-To-Launch, combines traditional clays and ClayCopter™ targets, Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: A cutting-edge app has been introduced, allowing users to access advanced clay shooting capabilities directly from their smartphones. This innovative application includes an interactive 'Touch-To-Launch' feature that enables users to control and personalize shooting presentations. Users can now mix traditional clay targets with ClayCopter™ targets for a unique tournament experience right in their own backyard. This groundbreaking app was launched in Columbia, Mo., on January 19, 2026.
